steps.title: Evaluate at launch time
steps.content:
The number $84$ is the value of the height function when $t=0$, which represents the launch moment.
$$h(0)=-16(0)^2+96(0)+84=84$$

steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content: At $t=0$, the object is $84$ feet above the ground. So the constant term represents the initial height, in feet, of the object. The answer is A.
